summary: The interruption closure manifest materializes the observed text-turn and fetch-shutdown recovery snapshots, the product can persist app-storage cancel-job, image partial-resume, and interrupted approval/export gate JSON from real queue/gate evidence, and the closure gate now rejects borrowed matrix payloads from another evidence path. The release remains blocked until those generated artifacts are captured from a packaged run.
